name: Risa Bettou
description: Risa Bettou is a third-year student at Hachimitsu Academy and the vice president of the aboveground Student Council. She is the love interest of [Reiji Andou](https://anilist.co/character/64855)—better known as Andre—and the best friend of Student Council's president, [Kate Takenomiya](https://anilist.co/character/175599). She serves as the warden of the prison block during the Underground Student Council's imprisonment.
